---
title: Statistics
date: 2019-09-09
title-block-banner: "#212529"
date-modified: last-modified
published-title: Last updated
toc: true
toc-location: left
toc-title: "Contents"
---

## Linear Models

### Design matrices
```{r}
type <- factor(c(rep("control", times = 4), rep("mutant", times = 4)))
weight <- c(2.4, 3.5, 4.4, 4.9, 1.7, 2.8, 3.2, 3.9)
size <- c(1.9, 3, 2.9, 3.7, 2.8, 3.3, 3.9, 4.8)
model.matrix(~type + weight)
model <- lm(size ~ type + weight)
summary(model)
```

```{r}
lab <- factor(
    c(rep("a", times = 6), rep("b", times = 6))
)

type <- factor(
    c(
        rep("control", times = 3), 
        rep("mutant", times = 3),
        rep("control", times = 3), 
        rep("mutant", times = 3)
    )
)

expression <- c(
    1.7, 2, 2.2,
    3.1, 3.6, 3.9,
    0.9, 1.2, 1.9,
    1.8, 2.2, 2.9
)
model.matrix(~lab + type)
### linear model
batch_lm <- lm(expression ~ lab + type)
summary(batch_lm)
```
